docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75880134) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE NLG 94 (JF), JANE DOE NLG 95 (CC), JANE AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION RASIER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RASIER-CA, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-20-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-19-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-28-2025
